source_types.note: Default type for named-journalist reporting with a URL.
Canadian Press or similar wire dispatch; may appear in multiple outlets.
Legislation text, court record, government statistical release, Hansard, order paper.
AI/search-tool generated summary. Not independently citable. Use to locate primary sources; replace before publication gate.
A video source; the record must include a verbatim transcript excerpt of the relevant passage.
A document provided directly, not accessible via URL. Include the pasted content field.
